topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Reliability Engineering. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for SRE Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Reliability Engineering is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Reliability Engineering in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Reliability Engineering
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Reliability Engineering.
Fix the bug in the given Reliability Engineering snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Reliability Engineering?
How does Reliability Engineering handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Reliability Engineering into a microservice
Scale Reliability Engineering for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Reliability Engineering
